sql.query: INSERT INTO tbl_workflow_types (id,tenantId,typeName,description,colour,sortOrder,isActive) SELECT (SELECT existing.id FROM tbl_workflow_types existing WHERE existing.id=NULLIF(:id,'') AND existing.tenantId=:tenantScope LIMIT 1),:tenantId,:typeName,NULLIF(:description,''),:colour,:sortOrder,:isActive FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_user_tenant_roles utr INNER JOIN tbl_roles r ON r.id=utr.roleId WHERE utr.userId=:userId AND utr.tenantId=:authorisedTenant AND utr.isActive=1 AND r.roleKey IN ('owner','admin') AND r.isActive=1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE typeName=VALUES(typeName),description=VALUES(description),colour=VALUES(colour),sortOrder=VALUES(sortOrder),isActive=VALUES(isActive),modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
